name: 10-andruia-skill-smith
tagline: Meta-skill that interviews the user then scaffolds a new skill's folder, README, and registry entry for the Andru.ia repo.
verdict: Simple, safe scaffolding workflow with no security issues. But it's thin on quality: vague 'When to Use', no stated exclusions, a placeholder-style hardcoded Windows path for the output folder, no example of the required registry-line format, and no check for numbering collisions on re-run.

highlights.summary: Description says what it does (designs/writes/deploys skills) but the 'When to Use' section only restates the description with no concrete trigger phrasing.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion language anywhere in description or body.
Step 1 of Fase 3: "Crear la carpeta física en `D:\...\agentic-awesome-skills\skills\`" is an unresolvable placeholder path, not an executable target.
